results.predicted_sparql:
PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?emotion (COUNT(DISTINCT ?polarityValue) as ?count)
WHERE {
GRAPH <http://liita.it/data> {
    ?lemma a lila:Lemma ;
           ontolex:writtenRep ?wr .
    
    
  }
?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?lemma .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarity ?polarity .
  ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarityValue ?polarityValue .
  FILTER(?polarityValue <= 0) .
?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?lemma .
  GRAPH <http://w3id.org/elita> {
    ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
  }

  FILTER(?polarityValue <= 0) .
}
GROUP BY ?emotion
ORDER BY ASC(?count)

PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX lime: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/lime#>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX vartrans: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/vartrans#>

SELECT ?lemma ?wr ?sentixLemma ?polarity ?polarityLabel ?polarityValue ?parmigianoLemma ?parmigianoWR
WHERE {
GRAPH <http://liita.it/data> {
    ?lemma a lila:Lemma ;
           ontolex:writtenRep ?wr .
    
    
  }
?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?lemma .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarity ?polarity .
  ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarityValue ?polarityValue .
?leparmigianoIta ontolex:canonicalForm ?lemma ;
               ^lime:entry <http://liita.it/data/id/LexicalReources/DialettoParmigiano/Lexicon> .
  ?leparmigianoIta vartrans:translatableAs ?leparmigianoPar .
  ?leparmigianoPar ontolex:canonicalForm ?parmigianoLemma .
  ?parmigianoLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?parmigianoWR .
}

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lexinfo: <http://www.lexinfo.net/ontology/3.0/lexinfo#>
PREFIX lime: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/lime#>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX vartrans: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/vartrans#>

SELECT ?relatedWord ?relatedSense ?liitaLemma ?sentixLemma ?polarity ?polarityLabel ?polarityValue ?elitaLemma ?emotion ?emotionLabel ?parmigianoLemma ?parmigianoWR ?italianWR
WHERE {
SERVICE <https://klab.ilc.cnr.it/graphdb-compl-it/> {
    ?word a ontolex:Word ;
          lexinfo:partOfSpeech [ rdfs:label ?pos ] ;
          ontolex:sense ?sense ;
          ontolex:canonicalForm [ ontolex:writtenRep ?lemma ] .

    ?sense lexinfo:hypernym ?relatedSense .

    FILTER(str(?pos) = "noun") .
    FILTER(str(?lemma) = "pianta") .

    ?relatedWord ontolex:sense ?relatedSense .
  }
?relatedWord ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarity ?polarity .
  ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarityValue ?polarityValue .
  FILTER(?emotion = elita:Gioia) .
  FILTER(?polarityValue >= -1) .
  FILTER(?polarityValue <= 1) .
VALUES ?emotion { elita:Gioia }
  ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  GRAPH <http://w3id.org/elita> {
    ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
    ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
  }

  FILTER(?polarityValue >= -1) .
  FILTER(?polarityValue <= 1) .
?leparmigianoIta ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma ;
               ^lime:entry <http://liita.it/data/id/LexicalReources/DialettoParmigiano/Lexicon> .
  ?leparmigianoIta vartrans:translatableAs ?leparmigianoPar .
  ?leparmigianoPar ontolex:canonicalForm ?parmigianoLemma .
  ?parmigianoLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?parmigianoWR .
?liitaLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?italianWR .
}

PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lexinfo: <http://www.lexinfo.net/ontology/3.0/lexinfo#>
PREFIX lime: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/lime#>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX vartrans: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/vartrans#>

SELECT ?relatedWord ?relatedSense ?liitaLemma ?sentixLemma ?polarity ?polarityLabel ?polarityValue ?elitaLemma ?emotion ?emotionLabel ?parmigianoLemma ?parmigianoWR ?sicilianLemma ?sicilianWR ?italianWR
WHERE {
SERVICE <https://klab.ilc.cnr.it/graphdb-compl-it/> {
    ?word a ontolex:Word ;
          lexinfo:partOfSpeech [ rdfs:label ?pos ] ;
          ontolex:sense ?sense ;
          ontolex:canonicalForm [ ontolex:writtenRep ?lemma ] .

    ?sense lexinfo:hypernym ?relatedSense .

    FILTER(str(?pos) = "noun") .
    FILTER(str(?lemma) = "pasta") .

    ?relatedWord ontolex:sense ?relatedSense .
  }
?relatedWord ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarity ?polarity .
  ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .
  ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarityValue ?polarityValue .
  FILTER(?emotion = elita:Gioia) .
  FILTER(?polarityValue >= -1) .
  FILTER(?polarityValue <= 1) .
VALUES ?emotion { elita:Gioia }
  ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  GRAPH <http://w3id.org/elita> {
    ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
    ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
  }

  FILTER(?polarityValue >= -1) .
  FILTER(?polarityValue <= 1) .
?leparmigianoIta ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma ;
               ^lime:entry <http://liita.it/data/id/LexicalReources/DialettoParmigiano/Lexicon> .
  ?leparmigianoIta vartrans:translatableAs ?leparmigianoPar .
  ?leparmigianoPar ontolex:canonicalForm ?parmigianoLemma .
  ?parmigianoLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?parmigianoWR .
?lesicilianSic ontolex:canonicalForm ?sicilianLemma .
  ?lesicilianIta vartrans:translatableAs ?lesicilianSic ;
               ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  ?sicilianLemma dcterms:isPartOf <http://liita.it/data/id/DialettoSiciliano/lemma/LemmaBank> ;
                  ontolex:writtenRep ?sicilianWR .
?liitaLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?italianWR .
}
